title: Sous-Vide Feather Blade Steak with Spicy Mango Salsa
description: A light and spicy post-workout meal featuring tenderized feather blade beef cooked sous-vide for an unparalleled raw-friendly experience.

ingredients.name: Chili Flakes (to taste)
ingredients.notes: For added spice, but keep in check for post-workout enjoyment.

instructions: Season the Feather Blade Beef Fillet with salt and pepper, then marinate it in Raw Organic Mango Salsa Mix for at least one hour.
Seal the marinated steak in a vacuum bag and cook in the sous-vide machine for approximately 2 hours or until fully tender.
Remove from cooker and let rest for about 15 minutes before slicing thinly against the grain.
While the steak rests, prepare the Mango Salsa by mixing fresh lime juice with chili flakes to taste.
Serve the cooked Feather Blade Steak alongside the spicy Mango Salsa.
